prompt: Using the provided reference image of the melon slices in a glass bowl, transform it into a premium luxury product advertisement poster. Keep the same fruit and bowl as the hero subject, but restage it with dramatic warm golden lighting, a dark black-and-gold upscale interior background, and a polished marble tabletop. Improve the fruit styling so it looks fresher, juicier, and more expensive, with refined commercial food photography retouching. Compose it as a vertical poster with elegant centered typography in metallic gold. Include 6 text elements: small top line “LIMITED RESERVE”, brand line “珀蜜”, large main headline “臻选蜜瓜”, subheadline “头茬限定・稀贵甄选”, body copy “不是水果，是收藏级鲜甜。”, and small bottom line “POMEE LUXURY FRUIT COLLECTION”. Overall mood: high-end, exclusive, sophisticated, like a luxury perfume or jewelry campaign but for fruit.
